rationale: Both candidates correctly identify and verify the core fix (already_submitted removal is safe because both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts), matching the sole ground-truth inline concern. X's extra findings (regression-test gap, len>1 fallthrough) are all traceable to the diff and cited line numbers. Y pads its review with unverifiable external claims (a specific GitHub issue #4839, a named commenter @akshatvishu, and details about a HunyuanImage-3.0 bridge never mentioned in the diff or ground truth) that read as fabricated/ungrounded, hurting precision despite similar recall and actionability.
